top_signals.title: Ukraine is not a Nato liability but an asset, says Zelenskyy
top_signals.summary: Also in this newsletter: Italy accuses Moscow of hybrid conflict after Russia spying arrests
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Soybean Oil Hits Three-Week High on Renewed US, Iran Tensions
top_signals.summary: Chicago soybean oil futures climbed to a three-week high after fresh US military strikes on Iran sent crude oil prices higher, raising the prospect of greater demand for biofuel feedstocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China’s 10-Year Bond Sale Sees Demand Gauge at Record High
top_signals.summary: A gauge of demand for an auction of China’s benchmark sovereign bonds touched an all-time high on Wednesday, indicating strong appetite for the securities.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Inflation: If they don’t know, now you know?
top_signals.summary: What fence-sitters can, and can’t, tell us about price increases
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Jailed Indian ordered slaying of Canada Sikh activist, U.S. claims
top_signals.summary: The 2023 assassination of a prominent Sikh activist in Vancouver prompted a diplomatic crisis between India and Canada.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: LDP plans tighter oversight of disclosures by activist investors
top_signals.summary: The proposals come as Japan has become one of the ‌world's busiest markets ‌for activist investing outside of the U.S.
